mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role, avatar, create_time, update_time, last_login_at FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, role, avatar, create_time, update_time, last_login_at FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, role, avatar, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `user` SET last_login_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
